articles.title: India Wildfires: Heatwave Conditions Spark Wildfires in Rajouri Forests - WION
articles.search_term: heatwave (Anantnag OR Bandipore OR Baramulla OR Budgam OR Doda OR Ganderbal OR Jammu OR Kathua OR Kishtwar OR Kulgam OR Kupwara OR Poonch OR Pulwama OR Rajouri OR Ramban OR Reasi OR Samba OR Shopian OR Srinagar OR Udhampur) Jammu and Kashmir
articles.full_text:
Published: May 29, 2026, 14:16 IST | Updated: May 29, 2026, 14:16 IST
Unrelenting heatwave conditions across India have triggered devastating wildfires in the forests of Rajouri. As temperatures soar to extreme levels, tinder-dry conditions are fueling the rapid spread of flames, threatening local biodiversity and residential areas. Local authorities and emergency response teams are battling the inferno, but the intense heat is hampering containment efforts.
